reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5108201586824019782/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5My1LOWlRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy mal atendidos por la señora del buffet. No nos dejaba conversar en paz, estamos de vacaciones. Aclaro que no había nadie en el buffet, solo nuestra familia y era en el horario del desayuno. Además la señora pidió que se retiren aquellos integrantes de la familia que no estaban consumiendo, me parece una falta de respeto, porque fuimos todos juntos y no nos puede echar del lugar y separarnos a la calle! Pongan un cartel de "prohibido hablar". O de última, revisen las reseñas tienen muchas quejas, y re mala puntuación.

(Translated by Google)
We received terrible service from the woman at the buffet. She wouldn't let us have a conversation, and we were on vacation. To clarify, there was no one else at the buffet, just our family, and it was during breakfast hours. Furthermore, she asked those family members who weren't eating to leave, which I find disrespectful, since we were all there together and she can't just kick us out and separate us on the street! Put up a "No Talking" sign. Or, at the very least, check the reviews; you have many complaints and a very bad rating.

reviewReply.comment: Sinceramente nos cuesta creer su afirmación, de ser cierto probablemente su conversación en paz debería revisar el volumen.

reviews.comment:

Unos ASALTANTES los precios para comprar algo de comer. Después se quejan cuando los turistas nos vamos a Chile u otro país

(Translated by Google)
The poor employee was overwhelmed; everything was very precarious. The prices for food are outrageous. Then they complain when tourists go to Chile or other countries.

reviewReply.comment: Sr Ruiz vamos a considerar su apreciación para optimizar nuestro servicio.

reviews.comment:
Deplorable atención, 35 minutos para cargar nafta, un solo playero, no wi-fi, solo tarjeta o efectivo. Perdes mucho mucho tiempo. ENTRA SÓLO SI NO TE QUEDA OTRA.

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service, 35 minutes to fill up, only one attendant, no Wi-Fi, only card or cash. You waste a lot of time. ONLY GO IN IF YOU HAVE NO OTHER OPTION.

reviewReply.comment: Lamentamos mucho la mala experiencia que ha sufrido, normalmente hay wi fi y todos los medios de pago están habilitados. La fibra optica de la zona, a veces presenta problemas. Reiteramos las disculpas del caso.

reviews.comment:
Pasamos a Cargar agua para el mate, básico de una estacion de servicio. Primero la señora que atiende adentro el kiosco me dice que no trabajan con merc pago ni con ningún medio digital, bueno valla y pase. Como volvíamos de chile no tenía pesos argentinos y le pregunté si me aceptaba pesos chilenos, la señora me dice que si. Pero que me los toma a exactamente el doble, jajaja una guachada!!! Me quede esperando el cambio, que eran 500 pesos, pero como no me los devolvía le dije señora el cambio, y me contesta q los dueños lo tomaban a ese precio. Jajajaja me reí con indignacion y le digo es una barbaridad eso... Si bien eran mil pesos la carga de agua me indigné. La señora no me dió el agua caliente y terminamos sin tomar mate en la ruta, por orgullo de no pagar el doble. Me parece que  el trato hacia los turistas debe primar. Por sobre el resto de las cosas... mi experiencia fatal. Cambien la política de atención a los turistas que es lo que le da de comer a toda la región. No espanten a la gente. Sean cordiales que no cuesta nada.

(Translated by Google)
We went to fill up our water for mate, a basic service station necessity. First, the woman working inside the kiosk told me they didn't accept Mercado Pago or any digital payment methods. Fine, go ahead and do it. Since we were returning from Chile, I didn't have any Argentine pesos, so I asked if she would accept Chilean pesos. She said yes, but that she would charge me exactly double the rate! Hahaha, what a rip-off! I waited for my change, which was 500 pesos, but when she didn't give it back, I asked her, "Ma'am, what's the change?" She replied that the owners accepted it at that rate. Hahaha, I laughed indignantly and told her, "That's outrageous!" Even though the water was 1,000 pesos, I was still indignant. The woman didn't give me hot water, and we ended up not having mate on the road, out of pride at not paying double. I think the treatment of tourists should be paramount, above all else... my experience was terrible. Change your policy on tourist services; tourists are the lifeblood of the entire region. Don't scare people away. Be friendly; it costs nothing.

reviewReply.comment: Sr Carlos, nos ocuparemos de revisar este episodio con la empleada. Desde ya, las disculpas del caso por la mala experiencia que nos narra.

reviews.comment:
Sencilla pero cumple con lo básico de toda estación de servicio! Cargan nafta, tienen los baños limpios, se puede comprar algo para comer y cargar agua caliente para el mate.

(Translated by Google)
Simple but it has all the basics of any gas station! They sell gas, the bathrooms are clean, you can buy something to eat and get hot water for mate.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5108201586824019782/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQzai1UZk5nEAE

reviews.comment:
Es lo que hay!
Ideal para cargar nafta y la típica parada técnica. No le pidas más. El chocolate es de máquina expendedora y sale $ 3,000 y la Señora que atiende si le caen 5 extranjeros juntos colapsa...pero es lo que hay en el camino y mejor cargar nafta porque después sonaste.

(Translated by Google)
It is what it is!
Ideal for filling up with gas and making the typical pit stop. Don't ask for more. The hot chocolate is from a vending machine and costs $3,000, and the lady serving you would collapse if she had five foreigners at once... but that's what it is on the road, and it's better to fill up with gas because you'll be dead afterward.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5108201586824019782/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNQaEpDUlVREAE
